creator: thindil@laeran.pl.eu.org
text:
Just short notice, I don't have currently too much time to test it:

Wine 8.11, I'm not sure about the next versions, compiles without problems or patches both, 64 and 32 bit on FreeBSD 14 with LLVM 16. I think it is worth to try to compile them on 13.2 with LLVM 16 too. The compiler was updated since the issue was created, so maybe the patch is available in 13.2 too.
